name: io.github.novadyne-hq/ledger-mcp
description: Double-entry accounting MCP server for AI agents — create accounts, post balanced journal entries, and pull trial-balance / general-ledger reports. 11 tools. Paid per call via x402 micropayments (USDC on Base); health + discovery are free.

environmentVariables.name: LEDGER_X402_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of a funded Base wallet (USDC) used to pay the x402 micropayment on each call. Optional — health and discovery work without it.

environmentVariables.name: LEDGER_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Ledger API base URL (default https://ledger-api.novadyne.ai).
